---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or tool for LeadPilot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What user need does this address? Reference `leadpilot-docs/prd/` if
this maps to an existing PRD section, or explain what's new.

## Proposed solution

What would this look like? If it adds or changes a tool, describe the
API it would call and the data shape it returns/expects.

## Security considerations

Does this introduce a new tool call, a new data source, or expand what
the agent can act on? If so, note what could go wrong — this feeds
`leadpilot-docs/security/threat-model.md`.

## Out of scope for this request

What's explicitly not part of this ask, to keep scope clear.
